//: Lighthouse-CI config for the BOUTIQUE theme. Identical collect/upload to
//2: lighthouserc.json, but the performance bar is >= 0.85 (vs >= 0.90 for the default theme): the
//3: editorial boutique theme ships a full-bleed hero + serif webfont + richer chrome, a deliberately
//4: heavier visual identity, so it gets a slightly lower (still strong) performance floor. Run against
//5: a storefront started with STOREFRONT_THEME=boutique. SOFT check (warn + continue-on-error) for the
//6: same runner-variance reason as the default config. a11y/best-practices/seo stay at >= 0.90.
